summary: Frontend-only testing executed for lineup pitch geometry update request. Static code review confirms most positional offset intents are implemented globally, but UI-level validation of lineup page was blocked because Flutter web renders on canvas without accessible selectors/data-testid in Playwright and login credentials are not available in repository.

ui_bugs.issue: Automation cannot access or click interactive controls via selectors (no semantic DOM/data-testid exposed), blocking reliable navigation to lineup management page.

integration_issues.flow: Navigate to lineup_players_page for visual geometry verification
integration_issues.issue: Blocked by non-testable frontend surface in browser automation (no selectable nodes), so requested visual checks across modules could not be completed end-to-end.

action_items: Fix left/right offset mapping: CCS should move left and CCD right; currently inverted.
Fix left/right offset mapping: CDCS should move left and CDCD right; currently inverted.
Expose tappable controls with testable semantics/data-testid (or enable Flutter semantics) so lineup screen can be validated via automation.
Provide test credentials in /app/memory/test_credentials.md for authenticated lineup flow validation.
critical_code_review_comments: lineup_pitch_view.dart::_horizontalOffsetForPositionCode appears to invert side semantics for CCS/CCD and CDCS/CDCD relative to naming (S=sinistra, D=destra).
All formation modules consume shared position offsets from LineupPitchView, so any side inversion propagates globally across modules.
TS/TD, ES/ED, AS/AD widening and COC advanced vertical placement are implemented and consistent at code level.
test_credentials: Checked /app/memory/test_credentials.md; no persisted test credentials available.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Public URL used: https://squadra-web.onrender.com. Home loads. Playwright could not detect buttons/inputs/text nodes due to canvas rendering and missing semantics hooks, so navigation to lineup page was blocked. Static code review identified likely left/right inversion for CCS/CCD and CDCS/CDCD offsets.
rca of the issue: RCA: layout regression likely in horizontal offset mapping signs for central split roles. Reproduction (code-level): inspect _horizontalOffsetForPositionCode in lineup_pitch_view.dart: CCS returns +0.16*spotWidth and CCD returns -0.16, CDCS returns +0.20 and CDCD returns -0.20; this places sinistra-coded roles to the right and destra-coded roles to the left. Mitigation: swap signs for these four roles and visually retest on lineup page across representative modules (e.g., 4-3-3 IN LINEA, 4-2-2-2, 3-5-2).
